title: Post-processing procedure for quantum key distribution systems
author: E.O. Kiktenko
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We present proof-of-principle realizations of algorithmic solutions aimed on post-processing procedure for quantum key distribution systems. The main steps of the procedure are error correction, parameter estimation, and privacy amplification. Authentication of classical public communication channel is also considered.
steps_raw: We present proof-of-principle realizations of algorithmic solutions aimed on post-processing procedure for quantum key distribution systems. The main steps of the procedure are error correction, parameter estimation, and privacy amplification. Authentication of classical public communication channel is also considered.
keywords: quantum key distribution, error correction, authentication, privacy amplification, information reconciliation, LDPC,  blind reconciliation
